title: Squirrel Removal in Greenpoint, Brooklyn | $900–$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Greenpoint, Brooklyn. Humane trapping, exclusion & damage repair. Serving Greenpoint homes & businesses. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Greenpoint's mix of historic brownstones, modern waterfront developments, and tree-lined streets creates the perfect environment for squirrels to thrive—and sometimes invade your attic or walls. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert squirrel removal services throughout Greenpoint, protecting homes and businesses from damage caused by these persistent rodents. Our humane, effective solutions ensure your property stays squirrel-free year-round.
whyUs: With years of experience serving Greenpoint residents, Best Pest Control NYC understands the unique challenges of squirrel infestations in Brooklyn's northernmost neighborhood. Our licensed technicians use humane trapping methods, comprehensive exclusion techniques, and thorough damage assessments to deliver lasting results at competitive prices ranging from $900 to $2,500.
localContext: From the historic Polish community near Nassau Avenue to the bustling waterfront along Greenpoint Avenue and McCarren Park's abundant tree cover, Greenpoint's diverse architecture presents varied entry points for squirrels. Whether you live in a century-old row house near McGolrick Park or a converted warehouse loft by the East River, our team knows how to identify and seal the vulnerabilities specific to Greenpoint buildings.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Greenpoint?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Greenpoint typically ranges from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work to seal entry points, and sanitation. We provide free inspections and upfront quotes for all Greenpoint properties.

faqs.question: Why are squirrels so common in Greenpoint?
faqs.answer: Greenpoint's mature trees along streets and in parks like McGolrick Park and McCarren Park provide ideal squirrel habitat. The neighborhood's older buildings often have gaps in soffits, vents, and rooflines that squirrels exploit for nesting, especially during fall and spring breeding seasons. The mix of residential and commercial properties also provides abundant food sources.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Greenpoint home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in your attic or walls (especially during early morning and evening), visible damage to roof edges or soffits, chewed wires or insulation, droppings in the attic, and seeing squirrels entering or exiting your roofline. Greenpoint homeowners often notice increased activity during fall when squirrels prepare for winter.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Greenpoint humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, ethical squirrel removal methods compliant with New York State regulations. We use live traps and one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to leave but not return. We never use poisons or lethal traps, and we follow all guidelines to ensure squirrels are removed safely and relocated according to local laws.
